test_queries.description: Pre-built test queries to demonstrate UFDR AI search capabilities

basic_search.expected_results: All WhatsApp communications from uploaded data
All messages sent by Michael Chen

basic_search.query: Show me calls longer than 5 minutes

advanced_search.query: Find all communication about financial reports between January 10-15
advanced_search.expected_results: Messages containing financial report discussions in date range

advanced_search.query: Show me suspicious messages with worried or concerned tone
Find deleted files and their recovery status
advanced_search.expected_results: Media files marked as deleted with recovery information

investigative_queries.query: What evidence suggests data theft in the corporate case?
Map the communication flow in the cybercrime network
Identify money laundering indicators in the drug case

timeline_analysis.query: What happened in the 24 hours before the FBI contact?
timeline_analysis.expected_results: Chronological events leading to law enforcement involvement

timeline_analysis.query: Show me the escalation pattern in the corporate fraud case
timeline_analysis.expected_results: Progressive evidence of increasing criminal activity

timeline_analysis.query: When did the suspects first communicate about illegal activities?

cross_reference.query: Find connections between the corporate and cybercrime cases
cross_reference.expected_results: Any overlapping contacts, methods, or patterns

cross_reference.query: Compare communication patterns across all three investigations
cross_reference.expected_results: Behavioral analysis across different crime types

cross_reference.query: Identify common tools and methods used by all suspects

scenarios.name: Corporate Fraud Network

scenarios.name: Cybercrime Network

5_minute_demo.query: Show me all messages about financial reports

15_minute_demo.query: Map all communication in the cybercrime case
Compare patterns across all three cases

troubleshooting_queries.description: Queries to test system functionality if issues arise

connectivity_tests.fallback: Check if data was uploaded successfully

sample_responses.description: Expected AI responses for key demo queries

financial_reports_query.query: Show me all messages about financial reports
financial_reports_query.expected_response: Found 3 messages discussing financial reports between Michael Chen and Lisa Rodriguez. Key themes include quarterly report adjustments, concerns about legality, and coordination before board meetings. Sentiment analysis shows increasing concern from Lisa Rodriguez about the legitimacy of the proposed changes.

suspicious_patterns_query.expected_response: Identified several suspicious patterns: 1) Encrypted messaging after business hours, 2) Use of coded language ('packages', 'deliveries'), 3) Communication spikes before major events, 4) Attempts to delete evidence after law enforcement contact. These patterns suggest coordinated criminal activity with operational security measures.

evidence_synthesis_query.expected_response: Multiple evidence streams indicate corporate fraud: Financial irregularities in quarterly reports, unauthorized data transfers to competitors, offshore account transactions, whistleblower concerns about security breaches, and attempts to obstruct investigation. The evidence shows a pattern of insider trading and corporate espionage involving the CFO and accounting staff.
